sutta: 4 uh liberated by wisdom liberated by wisdom he is called and as to what has the 1 liberated by wisdom been declared by the exalted 1 and the allu from sen's desire enters and abides in the first ghana and by wisdom understands it thus faster in 1 particular has the 1 liberated by wisdom been declared by the exalted 1 similarly for the second janata jana for jhana she of knight of the sphere of infinite space fear of infinite consciousness nothingness neither perception nor non-perception ending of perception and feeling now so
commentary: this suta is talking about the motto is the 1 liberated by wisdom and this refers to an arahant and just now i mentioned aryans mentioned in the kitagiri 2 of them are harahans 1 1 is this 1 liberated by wisdom and liberated by wisdom means a person attains the janus as mentioned in this he attains the he has he has attained the janus but when he is liberated at the moment of liberation he does not use the janus for example [Music] and 1 day when the buddha was talking to an external ascetic parabol sariputta stood by the side of the buddha and took a fan and was fanning the buddha and he was fanning the buddha he was listening to the conversation between the buddha and the external ascetic and when he was suddenly he attained insider and he attained liberation so such a person is called liberated by wisdom because at the moment of liberation the faculty of wisdom is strong the strongest he has he's not using jhana at that moment he's using wisdom that's why he said to be liberated by wisdom but even here as is mentioned in this utah even 1 who is liberated by wisdom still needs the first jana or the second or the third or the fourth jana or the other janas the arupa janas so jhanas are always needed for liberation but it is interesting here that even a person who attains the first jhana can attain liberation but this is not always the case usually the buddha mentions that the fourth jana is needed but sometimes in certain persons whose faculty of wisdom is very strong even with the first jana they can become an arahant the next is

items: The sphere of neither perception nor non-perception
The ending of perception and feeling
